description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a rectangular layout. The exterior walls are predominantly white, complemented by large windows that allow ample natural light into the interior spaces. The house includes a driveway leading to a garage, and a fenced yard with two prominent trees and some palm plants, adding greenery to the property. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some rooms having larger picture windows and others with smaller, standard windows. The main entryway is set back from the driveway, marked by a simple door and a small overhang, with no elaborate porch or columns. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with a focus on simplicity and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, large asymmetrical windows, and a fenced yard with trees and palms.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entryway, and two large trees in the yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the fenced yard, and the palm trees near the boundary.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard area, fence, and the arrangement of windows and trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back fence, trees, and the side of the house with fewer windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with a small overhang, no porch or columns, directly accessible from the driveway
